name: F8Framework
desc: F8 Framework是一个优雅，轻量，符合直觉的基于Unity引擎的游戏框架，组件围绕F8一键启动，框架整体遵循以极少的使用成本开发游戏。F8 Framework is an elegant, lightweight, and intuitive game framework based on the Unity…
descFull: F8 Framework是一个优雅，轻量，符合直觉的基于Unity引擎的游戏框架，组件围绕F8一键启动，框架整体遵循以极少的使用成本开发游戏。F8 Framework is an elegant, lightweight, and intuitive game framework based on the Unity engine. Its components are centered around the F8 one-click startup, and the framework as a whole is designed to enable game development with minimal usage cost.
